message:
Command `# The script uses shutil.which("ipm") — need ipm on PATH via symlink or PATH export in same shell
# Let's symlink ipm to a standard location and retry
ln -sf /nc/apps/bin/ipm /usr/local/bin/ipm 2>/dev/null || true
which ipm && echo "ipm found"` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# The script uses shutil.which("ipm") — need ipm on PATH via symlink or PATH export in same shell
# Let's symlink ipm to a standard location and retry
ln -sf /nc/apps/bin/ipm /usr/local/bin/ipm 2>/dev/null || true
which ipm && echo "ipm found""}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# The script uses shutil.which("ipm") — need ipm on PATH via symlink or PATH export in same shell
# Let's symlink ipm to a standard location and retry
ln -sf /nc/apps/bin/ipm /usr/local/bin/ipm 2>/dev/null || true
which ipm && echo "ipm found"
